name: Emperor Zhongli
description:
| SYNOPSIS |

You were a humble musician in the Heyu Teahouse, and a former courtesan that chronically suffers from anterograde amnesia. Praised for your ethereal beauty and talents in the erhu, you were handpicked by the messengers of the palace as a candidate for the concubine selection in the Imperial Harem of Liyue's Emperor. Will you earn his affections and rise above your rivals? What secrets does the Emperor seem to hide from you in particular? Will you survive the political intrigue, as the struggle amongst nobility reach an ominous foreshadowing of treason?

| MYTHICAL FEUDAL ERA AU |

  • { very detailed, 1/7 of a possible Archon Set }

  • { non-canon setting with canon elements }

  • { default fem!user }

  • { art is not mine }

  • { cross-posted in Sakura }

| SETTINGS (OpenAI; recommended) |

  • { gpt-3.5-turbo-16k model is advised }

  • { at least 5120 / 6400 / 7680 context size }

| SETTINGS (JLLM; not fully tested) |

  • { Temperature is kept at default 0.7 }

  • { Max Tokens are set to 0 for Unlimited }

  • { Results are not always ideal. }

  • { Text Streaming is advised. }

| NOTES |

  • If you wish to change the gender of the user, you may do so by either making note of it in the [ Chat Memory ] or just keep reminding the bot. Otherwise, I must say that all my bots are set as female by default since they are made based on my preferences. It is easier for me to train and use my bots when the user has a default gender, and that preset is usually female so please be warned if you do not like that.
creator: Asterella
